title: Plasticene Thermite Cube

{{Quote|They can defend all they want against a frontal assault—they hardly ever expect you to come at them through the walls.|[[Gunman]]|<ref name="Gundark">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>}}
'''Plasticene Thermite Cubes''', also referred to as '''plasticene thermite gel''', was a controlled explosive produced by [[Gatrellis]]. The [[Thermite/Legends|thermite]] gel was a malleable substance that could cut through a variety of substances. It was often used by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] to cut through hulls or bulkheads.<ref name="PP" />

Thermite Cubes consisted of a grayish-white, [[putty]]-like substance<ref name="Gundark" /> that could be shaped and molded, and a [[Kilogram/Legends|kilogram]] of the gel could be stretched to cover twenty square [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]].<ref name="PP" /> The gel came in one-kilogram cubes, covered in protective wrapping,<ref name="Gundark" /> each costing a thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="PP" />

The gel could be ignited by a remote relay,<ref name="PP" /> or an electronic [[Detonator/Legends|detonator]]. The thermite gel burned at a constant temperature of 2500 [[Standard (temperature)|degrees]] centigrade, which could defeat most locking mechanisms and, in sufficient quantities, burn through even a ship's hull.<ref name="Gundark" />

Plasticene thermite gel was sometimes used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForces]], but great skill was required to use it effectively.<ref name="ROE">''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''</ref> [[Gunman]], a member of [[Churhee's Riflemen]], also used it for this purpose, allowing his unit to attack opponents from unexpected places.<ref name="Gundark" />
